arts.ttl: Sunday's Transfer Talk Update: Robert Lewandowski, Jude Bellingham, Rodrygo
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Barcelona president Joan Laporta pays tribute to ‘loved’ Carles Minarro Garcia
arts.sum: Barcelona’s LaLiga game with Osasuna was postponed shortly before kick-off on Saturday evening after Minarro Garcia died at the team hotel.

arts.ttl: Ronald Araújo the latest Barcelona star to respond to team doctor’s death
arts.sum: Barcelona star Ronald Araújo has taken to social media late on Saturday, to provide his response to the news of Blaugrana team doctor Carles Miñarro Garcia’s sudden passing. Miñarro Garcia’s…

arts.ttl: Barcelona players pay tribute to first-team doctor after tragic death sees La Liga clash with Osasuna postponed
arts.sum: Barcelona's La Liga clash with Osasuna is postponed following the tragic news that the club's first-team doctor Carles Minarro Garcia has passed away.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid release statement in response to Barcelona team doctor’s death
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Saturday evening responded to the awful news stemming from the camp of arch rivals Barcelona. Developments in Barcelona have of course dominated the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Osasuna Postponed Following Death of First Team Doctor
arts.sum: Barcelona's La Liga match vs. Osasuna was postponed because of the passing Barça's first-team doctor.

arts.ttl: Barcelona match postponed minutes before kick off after death of team doctor
arts.sum: The Catalan club had been due to take on Osasuna in La Liga

arts.ttl: Pedri responds to Barcelona staff member’s death
arts.sum: Barcelona star Pedri has on Saturday night taken to social media, to confirm his ‘shock’ at the sudden passing of the club’s team doctor. The latest word stemming from the…

arts.ttl: Shock death sees Barcelona vs Osasuna game postponed
arts.sum: The game between FC Barcelona and Osasuna was suspended just minutes before kick-off, with reports of the death of ‘someone close to the players’ circulating. Barcelona can confirm the sad news of the death of first team doctor, Carlos Miñarro García, for this reason the game has been called off.

arts.ttl: Why Robert Lewandowski is not in Barcelona’s squad to face Osasuna
